# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: service_mesh_listener
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 8080
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                codec_type: AUTO
                access_log:
                  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                      log_format:
                        json_format:
                          timestamp: "%START_TIME%"
                          method: "%REQ(:METHOD)%"
                          path: "%REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)%"
                          protocol: "%PROTOCOL%"
                          response_code: "%RESPONSE_CODE%"
                          response_flags: "%RESPONSE_FLAGS%"
                          duration: "%DURATION%"
                          upstream_host: "%UPSTREAM_HOST%"
                          upstream_cluster: "%UPSTREAM_CLUSTER%"
                          bytes_received: "%BYTES_RECEIVED%"
                          bytes_sent: "%BYTES_SENT%"
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.health_check
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.health_check.v3.HealthCheck
                      pass_through_mode: false
                      headers:
                        - name: ":path"
                          string_match:
                            exact: "/healthz"
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.fault
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.fault.v3.HTTPFault
                      max_active_faults: 100
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.retry
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.retry.v3.RetryPolicy
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
                      suppress_envoy_headers: false
                route_config:
                  name: local_route
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: backend_service
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      retry_policy:
                        retry_on: "connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes,reset,retriable-headers"
                        num_retries: 3
                        per_try_timeout: 5s
                        retry_back_off:
                          base_interval: 0.25s
                          max_interval: 1s
                        retriable_status_codes:
                          - 502
                          - 503
                          - 504
                        retry_host_predicate:
                          - name: envoy.retry_host_predicates.previous_hosts
                        host_selection_retry_max_attempts: 5
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/users"
                          route:
                            cluster: users_service
                            timeout: 15s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream"
                              num_retries: 3
                              per_try_timeout: 5s
                              per_try_idle_timeout: 10s
                              retry_back_off:
                                base_interval: 0.5s
                                max_interval: 5s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/orders"
                          route:
                            cluster: orders_service
                            timeout: 30s
                            idle_timeout: 120s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,retriable-status-codes"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 10s
                              per_try_idle_timeout: 15s
                              retry_back_off:
                                base_interval: 1s
                                max_interval: 10s
                              retriable_status_codes:
                                - 503
                                - 504
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/inventory"
                          route:
                            cluster: inventory_service
                            timeout: 10s
                            idle_timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable"
                              num_retries: 5
                              per_try_timeout: 2s
                              retry_back_off:
                                base_interval: 0.1s
                                max_interval: 1s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: default_service
                            timeout: 15s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                stream_idle_timeout: 300s
                request_timeout: 60s
                request_headers_timeout: 10s

  clusters:
    - name: users_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      connect_timeout: 5s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: users_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: users-service.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 3s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: "/health"
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 1024
            max_retries: 3
          - priority: HIGH
            max_connections: 2048
            max_pending_requests: 2048
            max_requests: 2048
            max_retries: 5
      outlier_detection:
        consecutive_5xx: 5
        interval: 10s
        base_ejection_time: 30s
        max_ejection_percent: 50
        enforcing_consecutive_5xx: 100
        success_rate_minimum_hosts: 3
        success_rate_request_volume: 100
        success_rate_stdev_factor: 1900
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
            max_requests_per_connection: 1000
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options:
              max_concurrent_streams: 100
              initial_stream_window_size: 65536
              initial_connection_window_size: 1048576

    - name: orders_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: LEAST_REQUEST
      connect_timeout: 10s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: orders_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:

                      address: orders-service.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      health_checks:

      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:

              max_concurrent_streams: 50

admin:
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901
  access_log:
    - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
      typed_config:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog

overload_manager:
  refresh_interval: 0.25s
  resource_monitors:
    - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
      typed_config:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.resource_monitors.fixed_heap.v3.FixedHeapConfig
        max_heap_size_bytes: 2147483648
  actions:
    - name: envoy.overload_actions.shrink_heap
      triggers:
        - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
          threshold:
            value: 0.90
    - name: envoy.overload_actions.stop_accepting_requests
      triggers:
        - name: envoy.resource_monitors.fixed_heap
          threshold:
            value: 0.95
